qa_pairs.question: What is the main purpose of this document regarding Arbutus Cloud, and why is this action necessary?
qa_pairs.answer: This document describes how to migrate virtual machine (VM) instances and other cloud resources from the legacy Arbutus Cloud to the new Arbutus Cloud. This migration is necessary because the legacy Arbutus Cloud will be decommissioned in 2026.

qa_pairs.question: What is the deadline for RAS and RAC projects to complete their migration from the Legacy Arbutus Cloud to the New Arbutus Cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: The deadline for both RAS and RAC projects to migrate their resources from the Legacy Arbutus Cloud to the New Arbutus Cloud is August 31, 2026.

qa_pairs.question: What key questions should users answer when planning their cloud migration from the legacy Arbutus Cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: When planning a migration, users should determine which resources need to be migrated, identify if their instances are ephemeral or volume-backed, check if any volumes are larger than 150 GB (as these should be migrated using Globus), confirm if automated deployment systems were used, note if custom DNS entries need updating due to IP address changes, decide whether to use the OpenStack Dashboard or Command Line Interface for management, ensure all required users have OpenStack accounts, plan for the necessary outage duration, and if applicable, submit a request for RAS project migration.
